title: Langkloof storm wreaks havoc
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - As if grappling with the...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - As if grappling with the ongoing drought was not enough, strong storm winds wreaked havoc in the Langkloof area yesterday, leaving farmers, business owners and residents to count the cost.","html":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - As if grappling with the ongoing drought was not enough, strong storm winds wreaked havoc in the Langkloof area yesterday, leaving farmers, business owners and residents to count the cost."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Tornado-like gusts tore roofs from buildings, damaged fruit orchards, stripped tons of apples and pears from trees, uprooted large trees and left several structures damaged."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“It was as if someone swept a giant hand over the trees and businesses,” said a shop owner from Noll. Our business was spared by the grace of God, but the wind caused total devastation across the entire town.”","html":"“It was as if someone swept a giant hand over the trees and businesses,” said a shop owner from Noll. Our business was spared by the grace of God, but the wind caused total devastation across the entire town.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to the shop owner, the wind suddenly picked up just after 16:00 yesterday afternoon, 5 February. “Massive trees look as if they were picked up by hand and twisted. Power lines were torn down. A large part of the Langkloof was damaged by the wind.”","html":"According to the shop owner, the wind suddenly picked up just after 16:00 yesterday afternoon, 5 February. “Massive trees look as if they were picked up by hand and twisted. Power lines were torn down. A large part of the Langkloof was damaged by the wind.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read more and watch videos on sister publication, George Herald.","html":"Read more and watch videos on sister publication, George Herald."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Photo: Supplied","html":"Photo: Supplied"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘Ons bring jou die nuutste Tuinroete, Hessequa, Karoo nuus’","html":"‘Ons bring jou die nuutste Tuinroete, Hessequa, Karoo nuus’"}]
